creator: lwhsu@lwhsu.ckefgisc.org
text:
On Sat, Mar 10, 2007 at 00:22:47 +0800, Li-Wen Hsu wrote:
> Excuse me, please close this PR, ll-core 1.7.5 is out.

Well, let's save PR numbers, since it's not a big change.
Dear maintainer, please check this patch:

================================
diff -ruN -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/devel/py-ll-core/Makefile /home/lwhsu/ports/devel/py-ll-core/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/devel/py-ll-core/Makefile	Fri Mar  2 12:14:07 2007
+++ /home/lwhsu/ports/devel/py-ll-core/Makefile	Sat Mar 10 00:23:37 2007
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	ll-core
-PORTVERSION=	1.7.3
+PORTVERSION=	1.7.5
 CATEGORIES=	devel python
 MASTER_SITES=	http://ftp.livinglogic.de/core/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
diff -ruN -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/devel/py-ll-core/distinfo /home/lwhsu/ports/devel/py-ll-core/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/devel/py-ll-core/distinfo	Fri Mar  2 12:14:07 2007
+++ /home/lwhsu/ports/devel/py-ll-core/distinfo	Sat Mar 10 00:23:55 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (ll-core-1.7.3.tar.bz2) = e867432f48274b8c1764a8e174ca6499
-SHA256 (ll-core-1.7.3.tar.bz2) = 17cf597ee3e6fd17389d1821111cc31ebd2c967a25f58211c86043603a6f9810
-SIZE (ll-core-1.7.3.tar.bz2) = 102880
+MD5 (ll-core-1.7.5.tar.bz2) = 2cbd1b272ec5570144c64725c291f323
+SHA256 (ll-core-1.7.5.tar.bz2) = 8fa34daef984f195470c42bcbf0469a34934316f172d3094a1f1d704f18fcd13
+SIZE (ll-core-1.7.5.tar.bz2) = 103086
================================

-- 
Best Regards,
Li-Wen Hsu
